name: Ube Publisher / Maintainer
target: mobile app devs, vibecoders, solo indie studios
stack: Flutter, RN, Expo, iOS, Android, Unity
problem_statement: Building isn't the moat anymore. Distribution is.
nebula_threat: low — different vertical (mobile app distribution vs landing page conversion)
notes: No conversion tracking on their own site (irony). Closed waitlist limits conversion. Their defensibility = bundling 11 vendors. Ours = trigger-aware audit methodology + self-serve checkout.

applied_to: nebula homepage — audit scorecard mockup showing grade C, 5.8/10, dimension scores, top 3 fixes
impact: makes abstract audit output tangible before user submits form

applied_to: hero headline — 'Traffic isn't the leak. Your page is.'
impact: tighter emotional hook for founders burning ad spend
